title: 10 Herbal Creams For Motion Sickness
description: Ginkgo biloba creams contains flavonoids and terpenoids as its active constituents. Flavonoids, specifically quercetin and kaempferol, help to improve blood flow to the inner ear and reduce inflammation, which can contribute to motion sickness. Terpenoids, such as ginkgolides and bilobalide, have anti-inflammatory properties that may help to alleviate nausea and dizziness. These compounds may also help to improve cognitive function and reduce anxiety, which can exacerbate motion sickne...
